intro: The Gentlemen, Kyber, and Payouts King were the most active ransomware threat actors across 36 articles published between April 12 and April 26, 2026. Two critical vulnerabilities, CVE-2026-1731 (CVSS 9.8) and CVE-2026-34197 (CVSS 8.8), were frequently cited in attacks targeting multiple sectors including manufacturing, healthcare, logistics, and retail. The incidents had a global reach, with significant impacts in Europe, the United States, North America, and Turkey. The coverage included 28 high-severity, three critical, one medium, and two informational reports.
